response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks entry-level alignment with the role: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German proficiency is basic (not fluent as required), and the resume portrays a senior/full-stack engineer with no indication of willingness to start as a junior in insurance-sector agile teams.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is a hard requirement
No visible Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Overqualified and senior-focused profile suggests misalignment with entry-level role
